message:
fix(test): update useMissions assertions for emitMissionError 3rd arg (#6240) (#6245)

PR #6235 ("feat(analytics): enrich ksc_mission_error with error_detail")
added a 3rd `error_detail` argument to `emitMissionError(type, code, detail)`
but didn't update the 5 test assertions in useMissions.test.tsx that
still pinned the 2-arg signature. Coverage Suite #506 caught the drift
and filed #6240, mis-attributing it to PR #6237 (which only touched
unrelated card files for ErrorBoundary wraps).

Fix: 4 of the 5 assertions get `expect.anything()` for the 3rd arg
since the test exists to verify type+code, not the message body. The
5th (the 'fallback to Unknown error' test where the message is
intentionally missing) gets a literal `undefined` because
`expect.anything()` does NOT match undefined.

Verified: all 282 tests in useMissions.test.tsx pass, build clean.

Closes #6240.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
